brief_summary: Anatomy of a single Trends Tracker row, rendered like the live tracker. Five columns: name (Gateron Oil King, in serif italic), category (coral 'switch' chip), direction (coral up-arrow glyph), week score (+42, coral italic), sparkline (coral ascending line with a dot terminus). Dotted leader lines drop from each column to a two-line annotation describing what that column means and what makes it useful.
data_sources: trends-tracker-preview.mdx § 'How to read a row' — 'Five columns, left to right. Name. ... Category. ... Direction. ... Week score. A signed integer between -100 and 100 ... Sparkline. The last eight weeks of scores, drawn small ... In 2026-W19, Gateron Oil King sits at +42 with a clean ascending sparkline'
